mapper.select: SELECT c.*, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sys_task_comment r WHERE r.parent_id = c.comment_id AND r.deleted = 0) as reply_count FROM sys_task_comment c WHERE c.todo_id = #{todoId} AND c.deleted = 0 AND c.parent_id IS NULL ORDER BY c.create_time DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sys_task_comment WHERE todo_id = #{todoId} AND deleted = 0
